title: ASR Outdoor 5 Piece Gun Cleaning Brush And Pick Set
description:
Keep your firearms clean and running at peak performance with this ASR Outdoor 5 Piece Gun Cleaning Brush And Pick Set! This set comes with an assortment of cleaning tools, including: 3 double-sided brushes and 2 double-sided picks. One side is large for surface scrubbing, and the other is small for cleaning hard to reach areas. Brushes are made out of brass, copper, and nylon to get all the dirt and grime out of the way. This is the perfect gift for any firearms enthusiast in your life!
